essay_prompts: Through your resume and recommendations, we have a clear sense of your professional path to date. What are your career goals over the next three to five years and what is your long-term dream job? (500 words)
Please share a specific example of how you made a team more collaborative, more inclusive or fostered a greater sense of community within an organization. (250 words)

We believe Columbia Business School is a special place with a collaborative learning environment in which students feel a sense of belonging, agency, and partnership—academically, culturally, and professionally. How would you co-create your optimal MBA experience at CBS? Please be specific. (250 words)
data.key_differentiators: Columbia's primary advantage is its Manhattan location, providing access to Wall Street and thousands of multinational corporations as a 'living laboratory' for business students. The school offers both traditional MBA and accelerated January-entry programs, with the J-term option being somewhat less competitive for admission.
